## Summary

- Update 12 email blade templates and 11 Mailable classes to pass dynamic `currency_symbol` instead of hardcoding `KES`
- Follow the existing `PaymentReceived` pattern: resolve currency from Payment/Invoice model or Building''s `getEffectiveCurrency\(\)`, with `Currency::default\(\)` fallback
- Clean `.env.example` of 13 phantom OAuth/OCR env vars that no config file reads
- Remove hardcoded `''currency'' => ''KES''` from `config/mpesa.php` defaults

## Changes

### Mailable Classes \(11 files\)
Each Mailable now passes `currency_symbol` via the `with:` array using null-safe currency resolution:
- `InvoiceSent`, `InvoiceReminder` — from `$invoice->currency`
- `RentHikeNotice` — from `$building->getEffectiveCurrency\(\)`
- `DepositRefundNotification`, `TenantCredentials` — from `$lease->unit->building?->getEffectiveCurrency\(\)`
- `TenantWelcome`, `TenantInvitationMail` — from `$invitation->unit->building->getEffectiveCurrency\(\)`
- `OverpaymentNotification` — from `$payment->currency`
- `CreditNoteIssued` — cascade: invoice currency → building currency → default
- `PaymentVerificationApproved`, `PaymentVerificationRejected` — from `$lease->unit->building->getEffectiveCurrency\(\)`

### Blade Templates \(12 files\)
Replaced ~38 hardcoded `KES` occurrences with `{{ $currency_symbol }}` across all email templates.

### Controller \(1 file\)
`TenantController::emailStatement\(\)` — added `currency_symbol` to inline `Mail::send\(\)` data array.

### Config Cleanup \(2 files\)
- `.env.example` — removed 13 phantom env vars \(OAuth social login + OCR\) added by a previous AI session
- `config/mpesa.php` — removed `''currency'' => ''KES''` from defaults \(M-Pesa is KES-only by nature; currency is per-building via PaymentConfiguration\)

## Test plan

- [x] 13 unit tests in `EmailCurrencySymbolTest` verify USD buildings render `$` not `KES`
- [x] Full test suite passes \(1330 tests, 0 failures\)
- [x] Laravel Pint passes clean
- [x] Grep confirms zero `KES` remaining in `resources/views/emails/`
- [x] DBP verification 8/8 checks pass
- [x] Backward compatible — null currency falls back to `KSh` via `Currency::default\(\)`
